title: bastardia viscosa var. parvifolia
intro: Bastardia viscosa var. parvifolia, also known as Dwarf Bastardia or Small-leaved Bastardia, is a shrub-like plant that belongs to the Asteraceae family. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Bastardia viscosa var. parvifolia are said to include the reduction of inflammation, the treatment of wounds and skin irritations, and the alleviation of fever. The plant is commonly prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and it can also be used in the form of a topical application or salve for external use.
